label: bark_alert
translation: Mochi: Human, I have detected suspicious activity near the front door at 8:30 PM. Please investigate while I remain extremely brave. Memory says: A delivery arrived yesterday at the same time. | Mochi received a treat after alerting the owner. Personality filter: dramatic, loyal, easily offended.

label: meow_hungry
translation: Luna: Esteemed food provider, my bowl situation near the kitchen food bowl requires urgent executive attention. Memory says: Breakfast was delayed by ten minutes. | The bowl was empty in the last check-in. Personality filter: royal, calm, very food-motivated.

label: purr_happy
translation: Bean: Your service is acceptable. Continue the current comfort protocol near the sofa grooming session. Memory says: The owner brushed Bean for three minutes. | Bean leaned toward the brush instead of walking away. Personality filter: soft, affectionate, slightly smug.

label: whine_anxious
translation: Nova: I am not panicking, but I would appreciate emotional backup around the veterinary clinic waiting area. Memory says: Nova saw another dog enter the exam room. | The owner has been sitting quietly for five minutes. Personality filter: smart, sensitive, negotiation-oriented.
